zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Prayers於1307年10月7日出生在英國艾可希布爾 丁加姆時，她的父親Sir Thomas de Praers20歲，母親Anne of Essex22歲。她於大約1338年與Robert Bourchier, 1st Baron Bourchier在英國艾可希布爾 丁加姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1360年6月1日在英國艾可蕾托 伊斯頓享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可蕾托 伊斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Prayers于1307年10月7日出生在英国艾可希布爾 丁加姆时，她的父亲Sir Thomas de Praers20岁，母亲Anne of Essex22岁。她于大约1338年与Robert Bourchier, 1st Baron Bourchier在英国艾可希布爾 丁加姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1360年6月1日在英国艾可蕾托 伊斯頓享年52岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可蕾托 伊斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Prayers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: rare variant of   Prior  . In the US, it is found mainly among African Americans.
German: variant of   Preyer   or   Breyer   ‘brewer’. This surname is very rare in Germany.
French (southern): from Old French praier, an occupational name for a worker responsible for the maintenance of meadows.

variants.name: Prior
meanings: English (southern), Scottish, Dutch, and German: ultimately from Latin prior ‘superior’, used to denote a prior, a monastic official immediately subordinate to an abbot, hence a nickname for someone thought to resemble a prior.
Irish: Anglicized form of Irish Gaelic Mac an Phríora ‘son of the prior’ (this is the usual origin in counties Cavan and Leitrim). Some examples may be Anglo-Norman, the same name as in 1 above.
Portuguese, Spanish, and Catalan: from prior, probably denoting someone in the service of a prior or a nickname for someone who behaved in a pompous way.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Prayers was born on 7 October 1307, in Sible Hedingham, Essex, England, her father, Sir Thomas de Praers, was 20 and her mother, Anne of Essex, was 22. She married Robert Bourchier, 1st Baron Bourchier about 1338, in Sible Hedingham, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 1 June 1360, in Little Easton, Essex, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Little Easton, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Prayers est née le 7 octobre 1307, à Sible Hedingham, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas de Praers, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Anne of Essex, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Bourchier, 1st Baron Bourchier environ 1338, à Sible Hedingham, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 1 juin 1360, à Little Easton, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Little Easton, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat um 1338 in Sible Hedingham, Essex, England Robert Bourchier, 1st Baron Bourchier geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 1. Lei sposato Robert Bourchier, 1st Baron Bourchier circa 1338, nel Sible Hedingham, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Prayersが1307年10月7日にイギリスエセックスシブル ヘディンガムで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Praersは20歳，母Anne of Essexは22歳であった。約1338年にイギリスエセックスシブル ヘディンガムでRobert Bourchier, 1st Baron Bourchierと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1360年6月1日にイギリスエセックスリットル エアストンで52歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスリットル エアストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Prayers(이)가 1307년 10월 7일 영국 에세스 시블일 헤딩함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Praers(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne of Essex(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1338년 영국 에세스 시블일 헤딩함에서 Robert Bourchier, 1st Baron Bourchier(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1360년 6월 1일 영국 에세스 리틀 이스트에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 리틀 이스트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Prayers nasceu em 7 de outubro de 1307, em Sible Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Praers, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Anne of Essex, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Bourchier, 1st Baron Bourchier aproximadamente 1338, em Sible Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1 de junho de 1360, em Little Easton, Essex, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Little Easton, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Prayers родилась 7 октября 1307 г. в местности сибл хедингхам, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Praers было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne of Essex, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Bourchier, 1st Baron Bourchier около 1338 г. в местности сибл хедингхам, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 1 июня 1360 г. в местности литл эастон, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности литл эастон, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
